prompt: Wide panoramic scene split into four vignettes connected by flowing lines — this is the MIRROR of an earlier panel showing the same four people, but now everything is going well. Far left: the same parent from before, now on their couch smiling at their phone — the ad they see is relevant and useful, they look pleasantly surprised. Center-left: the same bakery owner in an apron, now in a bustling shop with customers at the counter, a second location 'grand opening' banner visible through a window next door — she is smiling and confident. Center-right: the same journalist at her desk, but now the newsroom is bigger with more colleagues, she's writing confidently and energetically — the monitor behind her shows an upward-trending revenue graph. Far right: the same young Kenyan woman entrepreneur (dark skin, natural hair in a puff, bright colorful blouse) now in a bigger, busier workspace — shipping boxes are stacked and being sent out, a map or globe nearby suggests she's reaching customers across the continent, she looks proud and happy. All four people should look satisfied, confident, and thriving — a clear contrast to the frustrated, concerned versions of themselves. The composition and layout should echo the earlier panel (same positions, same connected dotted lines) but with warm, optimistic energy. Warmer color accents (touches of amber and gold alongside the teal). No text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: The same four people from Panel 1, now thriving: the consumer sees a relevant ad, the bakery has expanded, the newsroom is growing, and the Nairobi entrepreneur is shipping across the continent
